query: SELECT AVG(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`) AS `avg_l_discount_ok`, AVG(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice`) AS `avg_l_extendedprice_ok`, AVG(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity`) AS `avg_l_quantity_ok`,`mongo_lineitem`.`l_linestatus` AS `l_linestatus`,`mongo_lineitem`.`l_returnflag` AS `l_returnflag`, SUM(((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`)) * (1 + `mongo_lineitem`.`l_tax`))) AS `sum_Calculation_4310711085325373_ok`, SUM((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`))) AS `sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok`, SUM(1) AS `sum_Number of Records_ok`, SUM(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice`) AS `sum_l_extendedprice_ok`, SUM(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity`) AS `sum_l_quantity_ok` FROM `mongo_lineitem` WHERE (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipdate` <= TIMESTAMP('1998-09-02 00:00:00')) GROUP BY 4, 5

select mongo_part.p_mfgr as p_mfgr, mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey as ps_partkey, mongo_partsupp.ps_s_n_name as ps_s_n_name, mongo_supplier.s_address as s_address, mongo_supplier.s_comment as s_comment, mongo_supplier.s_name as s_name, mongo_supplier.s_phone as s_phone, mongo_supplier.s_acctbal as sum_s_acctbal_ok from mongo_partsupp join mongo_supplier on (mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join (select mongo_part.p_partkey as p_partkey, min(mongo_partsupp.ps_supplycost) as __measure__0 from mongo_partsupp join mongo_supplier on (mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) where (mongo_supplier.s_r_name = 'EUROPE') group by 1) as t0 on (mongo_part.p_partkey = t0.p_partkey) where ((mongo_supplier.s_r_name = 'EUROPE') and ((mongo_partsupp.ps_supplycost = t0.__measure__0) and (mongo_part.p_size = 15) and (right(rtrim(lower(mongo_part.p_type)), length('brass')) = 'brass')))

select mongo_orders.o_orderdate as o_orderdate, mongo_orders.o_orderkey as o_orderkey, mongo_orders.o_shippriority as o_shippriority, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok from mongo_orders join mongo_lineitem on mongo_orders.o_orderkey = mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey where mongo_orders.o_c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' and mongo_orders.o_orderdate < date('1995-03-15') and mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate > date('1995-03-15') group by 1, 2, 3 order by sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok desc limit 10

select count(distinct mongo_orders.o_orderkey) as ctd_o_orderkey_ok, mongo_orders.o_orderpriority as o_orderpriority from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_lineitem.l_commitdate < mongo_lineitem.l_receiptdate) and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate >= timestamp('1993-07-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate < timestamp('1993-10-01 00:00:00'))) group by 2

select mongo_supplier.s_n_name as s_n_name, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_customer.c_nationkey = mongo_supplier.s_nationkey) and (mongo_customer.c_r_name = 'ASIA') and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate >= timestamp('1994-01-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate < timestamp('1995-01-01 00:00:00'))) group by 1

select sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*mongo_lineitem.l_discount)) as sum_Calculation_8100805085146752_ok from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_lineitem.l_discount >= 0.050000000000000003) and (mongo_lineitem.l_discount <= 0.070000000000000007) and (mongo_lineitem.l_quantity <= 23) and (mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate >= timestamp('1994-01-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate < timestamp('1995-01-01 00:00:00'))) having (count(1) > 0)

select mongo_customer.c_n_name as c_n_name, mongo_supplier.s_n_name as s_n_name, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok, year(mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate) as yr_l_shipdate_ok from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((not (mongo_customer.c_nationkey = mongo_supplier.s_nationkey)) and (mongo_customer.c_n_name in ('FRANCE', 'GERMANY')) and (mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate >= timestamp('1995-01-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate <= timestamp('1996-12-31 00:00:00')) and (mongo_supplier.s_n_name in ('FRANCE', 'GERMANY'))) group by 1, 2, 4

select mongo_supplier.s_n_name as s_n_name, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok, year(mongo_orders.o_orderdate) as yr_o_orderdate_ok from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_customer.c_r_name = 'AMERICA') and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate >= timestamp('1995-01-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_orders.o_orderdate <= timestamp('1996-12-31 00:00:00')) and (mongo_part.p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL')) group by 1, 3

SELECT `mongo_lineitem`.`l_s_n_name` AS `l_s_n_name`,   SUM(((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`)) - (`mongo_partsupp`.`ps_supplycost` * `mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity`))) AS `sum_Calculation_1690805085450945_ok`,   YEAR(`mongo_orders`.`o_orderdate`) AS `yr_o_orderdate_ok` FROM `mongo_lineitem`   INNER JOIN `mongo_partsupp` ON ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_partsupp`.`ps_partkey`) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_partsupp`.`ps_suppkey`))   INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`) WHERE (LOCATE('green',LOWER(`mongo_lineitem`.`l_p_name`)) > 0) GROUP BY 1,   3

SELECT `mongo_customer`.`c_acctbal` AS `c_acctbal`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_address` AS `c_address`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_comment` AS `c_comment`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey` AS `c_custkey`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_n_name` AS `c_n_name`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_name` AS `c_name`,  `mongo_customer`.`c_phone` AS `c_phone`,  SUM((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`))) AS `sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok`FROM `mongo_lineitem`  INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)  INNER JOIN (  SELECT `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey` AS `c_custkey`,    SUM((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`))) AS `$__alias__0`  FROM `mongo_lineitem`    INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)  WHERE ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_returnflag` = 'R') AND (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderdate` >= TIMESTAMP('1993-10-01 00:00:00')) AND (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderdate` < TIMESTAMP('1994-01-01 00:00:00')))  GROUP BY 1  ORDER BY `$__alias__0` DESC  LIMIT 20) `t0` ON (`mongo_customer`.`c_custkey` = `t0`.`c_custkey`)WHERE ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_returnflag` = 'R') AND (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderdate` >= TIMESTAMP('1993-10-01 00:00:00')) AND (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderdate` < TIMESTAMP('1994-01-01 00:00:00')))GROUP BY 1,  2,  3,  4,  5,  6,  7

select mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey as ps_partkey, sum((mongo_partsupp.ps_supplycost*mongo_partsupp.ps_availqty)) as sum_Calculation_6140711155912621_ok from mongo_partsupp join mongo_supplier on (mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) where (mongo_partsupp.ps_s_n_name = 'GERMANY') group by 1

SELECT (CASE WHEN (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderpriority` IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH')) THEN '1-URGENT' WHEN (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderpriority` IN ('3-MEDIUM', '4-NOT SPECIFIED', '5-LOW')) THEN '3-MEDIUM' ELSE `mongo_orders`.`o_orderpriority` END) AS `O Orderpriority (group)`,   `mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipmode` AS `l_shipmode`,   SUM(1) AS `sum_Number of Records_ok` FROM `mongo_lineitem`   INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)   INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)   INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)   INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`) WHERE ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_commitdate` < `mongo_lineitem`.`l_receiptdate`) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipdate` < `mongo_lineitem`.`l_commitdate`) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_receiptdate` >= TIMESTAMP('1994-01-01 00:00:00')) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_receiptdate` < TIMESTAMP('1995-01-01 00:00:00')) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipmode` IN ('MAIL', 'SHIP'))) GROUP BY 1,   2

select t0.__measure__0 as Calculation_1361031105746580, count(distinct mongo_customer.c_custkey) as ctd_c_custkey_ok from mongo_customer join (select mongo_customer.c_custkey as c_custkey, count((case when (not ((locate('special', mongo_orders.o_comment) > 0) and (if(isnull(locate('special', mongo_orders.o_comment)), null, locate('requests', mongo_orders.o_comment, greatest(1, floor(locate('special', mongo_orders.o_comment))))) > 0))) then mongo_orders.o_orderkey else null end)) as __measure__0 from mongo_customer left join mongo_orders on (mongo_customer.c_custkey = mongo_orders.o_custkey) group by 1) as t0 on (mongo_customer.c_custkey <=> t0.c_custkey) group by 1

SELECT (NOT ISNULL(`t0`.`_Tableau_join_flag`)) AS `io_Promo Tpe_nk`,  SUM((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_extendedprice` * (1 - `mongo_lineitem`.`l_discount`))) AS `sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok`FROM `mongo_lineitem`  INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)  INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)  LEFT JOIN (  SELECT `mongo_part`.`p_type` AS `p_type`,    MIN(1) AS `_Tableau_join_flag`  FROM `mongo_lineitem`    INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)    INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)  WHERE (LEFT(`mongo_part`.`p_type`, LENGTH('PROMO')) = 'PROMO')  GROUP BY 1) `t0` ON (`mongo_part`.`p_type` <=> `t0`.`p_type`)WHERE ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipdate` >= TIMESTAMP('1995-09-01 00:00:00')) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipdate` < TIMESTAMP('1995-10-01 00:00:00')))GROUP BY 1

sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as sum_Calculation_7060711085256495_ok from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join (select mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey as l_suppkey, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as __measure__0 from (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate >= timestamp('1996-01-01 00:00:00')) mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey as l_suppkey, sum((mongo_lineitem.l_extendedprice*(1-mongo_lineitem.l_discount))) as __measure__1 from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = by 1) as t1 having (count(1) > 0)) as t2 where (((mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate >= timestamp('1996-01-01 00:00:00')) and (mongo_lineitem.l_shipdate < timestamp('1996-04-01 00:00:00'))) and (t0.__measure__0 = t2.__measure__2)) group by 1, 2, 3, 4

select count(distinct mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey) as ctd_ps_suppkey_ok, mongo_part.p_brand as p_brand, mongo_part.p_size as p_size, mongo_part.p_type as p_type from mongo_partsupp join mongo_supplier on (mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join (select mongo_supplier.s_suppkey as s_suppkey from mongo_partsupp join mongo_supplier on (mongo_partsupp.ps_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_partsupp.ps_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) group by 1 having (max((case when ((locate('Customer', mongo_supplier.s_comment) > 0) and (if(isnull(locate('Customer', mongo_supplier.s_comment)), null, locate('Complaints', mongo_supplier.s_comment, greatest(1, floor(locate('Customer', mongo_supplier.s_comment))))) > 0)) then 1 else 0 end)) = 0)) as t0 on (mongo_supplier.s_suppkey = t0.s_suppkey) where ((mongo_part.p_brand != 'Brand#45') and (mongo_part.p_size in (3, 9, 14, 19, 23, 36, 45, 49)) and (isnull(mongo_part.p_type) or (not (left(lower(mongo_part.p_type), length('medium polished')) = 'medium polished')))) group by 2, 3, 4

  INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)   WHERE (`mongo_part`.`p_container` IN ('LG BOX', 'LG CASE', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG'))   GROUP BY 1 ) `t2` ON (`mongo_part`.`p_container` <=> `t2`.`p_container`) WHERE ((((NOT ISNULL(`t0`.`_Tableau_join_flag`)) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_brand` = 'Brand#12') AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` >= 1) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` <= 11) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` >= 1) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` <= 5)) OR ((NOT ISNULL(`t1`.`_Tableau_join_flag`)) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_brand` = 'Brand#23') AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` >= 10) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` <= 20) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` >= 1) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` <= 10)) OR ((NOT ISNULL(`t2`.`_Tableau_join_flag`)) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_brand` = 'Brand#34') AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` >= 20) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_quantity` <= 30) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` >= 1) AND (`mongo_part`.`p_size` <= 15))) AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipinstruct` = 'DELIVER IN PERSON') AND (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_shipmode` = 'AIR')) HAVING (COUNT(1) > 0)

select mongo_supplier.s_address as s_address, mongo_supplier.s_name as s_name from mongo_lineitem join mongo_orders on (mongo_lineitem.l_orderkey = mongo_orders.o_orderkey) join mongo_customer on (mongo_orders.o_custkey = mongo_customer.c_custkey) join mongo_part on (mongo_lineitem.l_partkey = mongo_part.p_partkey) join mongo_supplier on (mongo_lineitem.l_suppkey = mongo_supplier.s_suppkey) where ((left(lower(mongo_part.p_name), length('forest')) = 'forest') and (mongo_supplier.s_n_name = 'CANADA')) group by 1, 2

SELECT `mongo_supplier`.`s_name` AS `s_name` FROM `mongo_lineitem`   INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)   INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)   INNER JOIN (   SELECT `mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` AS `none_L Orderkey (copy)_ok`   FROM `mongo_lineitem`     INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)   GROUP BY 1   HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_commitdate` < `mongo_lineitem`.`l_receiptdate`) THEN `mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` ELSE NULL END)) = 1) ) `t0` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `t0`.`none_L Orderkey (copy)_ok`)   INNER JOIN (   SELECT `mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` AS `none_l_orderkey_ok`   FROM `mongo_lineitem`     INNER JOIN `mongo_orders` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `mongo_orders`.`o_orderkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_customer` ON (`mongo_orders`.`o_custkey` = `mongo_customer`.`c_custkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_part` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_partkey` = `mongo_part`.`p_partkey`)     INNER JOIN `mongo_supplier` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey` = `mongo_supplier`.`s_suppkey`)   GROUP BY 1   HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT `mongo_lineitem`.`l_suppkey`) > 1) ) `t1` ON (`mongo_lineitem`.`l_orderkey` = `t1`.`none_l_orderkey_ok`) WHERE ((`mongo_lineitem`.`l_commitdate` < `mongo_lineitem`.`l_receiptdate`) AND (`mongo_orders`.`o_orderstatus` = 'F') AND (`mongo_supplier`.`s_n_name` = 'SAUDI ARABIA') AND ISNULL(`mongo_supplier`.`s_name`)) LIMIT 1

select (case when 2 >= 0 then left(mongo_customer.c_phone, 2) else null end) as Calculation_5131031153053149, count(mongo_customer.c_custkey) as cnt_c_custkey_ok, sum(mongo_customer.c_acctbal) as sum_c_acctbal_ok from mongo_customer left join mongo_orders on (mongo_customer.c_custkey = mongo_orders.o_custkey) cross join (select avg(t0.__measure__0) as __measure__1 from (select mongo_customer.c_custkey as c_custkey, max(mongo_customer.c_acctbal) as __measure__0 from mongo_customer where (((case when 2 >= 0 then left(mongo_customer.c_phone, 2) else null end) in ('13', '17', '18', '23', '29', '30', '31')) and (mongo_customer.c_acctbal >= 0)) group by 1) as t0 having (count(1) > 0)) as t1 where ((((case when 2 >= 0 then left(mongo_customer.c_phone, 2) else null end) in ('13', '17', '18', '23', '29', '30', '31')) and (mongo_customer.c_acctbal >= 0)) and ((mongo_customer.c_acctbal > t1.__measure__1) and isnull(mongo_orders.o_orderkey))) group by 1
